title: JustTimm's Enhanced Colors
description: JustTimm's Enhanced Colors is a resource pack that changes the colormaps for all biomes, making each one look and feel more unique so every biome really stands out.
body:
![Header](https://i.imgur.com/BEGdMxl.png) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/At961cJW?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=1BD96A&labelColor=494B54&color=1BD96A)](https://modrinth.com/project/justtimms-enhanced-colors) [![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/At961cJW?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=494B54&color=1BD96A)](https://modrinth.com/project/justtimms-enhanced-colors) [![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCV4vHsM-p6GXsJTU-S7GSLQ?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&label=YouTube&labelColor=494B54&color=FF0033)](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCV4vHsM-p6GXsJTU-S7GSLQ) [![TikTok](https://img.shields.io/badge/TikTok-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=tiktok&logoColor=white)](https://www.tiktok.com/@justtimms_resource_packs) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/738674569195290734?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&labelColor=494B54&color=5865F2)](https://discord.com/invite/runTSv2) JustTimm's Enhanced Colors is a resource pack that changes the colormaps for all biomes, making each one look and feel more unique so every biome really stands out. Every biome is individually tuned to feel more natural, vibrant, or atmospheric without breaking Minecraft’s original style. Check out JustTimm's Enhanced Colors on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/justtimms-enhanced-colors) and [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/justtimm-s-enhanced-colors-6872623/)! ---
❓What does this resource pack change? This pack changes the colormap for: - 🌱 Bushes, Grass and Ferns - 🌿 Lily Pads, Sugar Cane and Vines - 🍂 Leaves - 🌊 Water - 🌌 Sky and Fog
⚙️Recommended Settings Video Settings → Quality... - Custom Colors: **ON**

## ❓ FAQ
Q: Do I need OptiFine for this pack to work? A: Yes, you do need OptiFine otherwise it doesn't work.
Q: These colormaps look like the ones in JustTimm's Vanilla Additions? A: That's right. I stopped updating Vanilla Additions because it got hard to maintain and confusing for some players with all the add-onns and additions. Now, some of its features live in separate, easier-to-use resource packs.

## 🤔Terms of use You are **free** to: - Use this pack on your server. - Alter the pack for personal use. - Combine with other packs for personal use and play. - Use this pack in YouTube videos. _(Credit is appreciated)_ You are **NOT** allowed to: - Claim ownership over the textures/models in this pack. - Reupload the entire resource pack elsewhere. - Redistribute unedited individual assets from the pack without permission and credit. - Redistribute edited assets from the pack without permission and credit. --- ## 🚧 Other Projects [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/Y8w9ZeH.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-lightsaber-workshop)
